product.interior_format: single-page PDF, pages in reading order, first printed page is right-hand
product.cover_format: separate one-piece PDF: back + spine + front; spine width set by Lulu from page count + paper

hardcover_casewrap.cover: one-piece PDF per Lulu casewrap template: back+spine+front PLUS wrap (~0.75in) + hinge; pull exact wrap and spine from Lulu for the final page count + paper

product.arabic_note: Trait words are voweled; have a native speaker proof before the first print run.

photos.note: Customer-supplied. Recommend ~2625x2625 px (300 PPI) JPEG/PNG, sRGB. One per slot below.

traits.body: I am kind. I speak softly and I love to help. Allah loves a gentle heart, and mine is one of them.
I am grateful. For every gift, big and small, I whisper Alhamdulillah. The more I thank Allah, the fuller my heart feels.
I love my parents. I listen to them and help without being asked. Their dua follows me wherever I go.
I am generous. I love to give and to watch others smile. Whatever I share, Allah gives back and more.
I am honest. I speak the truth, even when it is the hard thing to do. Allah stands with those who are true.
I am forgiving. I set down my anger and choose peace instead. When I forgive others, Allah is gentle with me.
I am patient. I breathe, I wait, and I trust Allah's plan. The best things are always worth the wait.
I am brave. When something feels big, I stand a little taller. With Allah beside me, I am never alone.
I am curious. I ask, I wonder, and I reach for something new. Every answer shows me how wonderful Allah's world is.
I am clean. I take care of my body, my space, and my heart. To Allah, a clean heart shines the brightest.
I am cheerful. I carry a smile and share it freely. A smile is a gift, and giving it is a kindness Allah loves.
I am mindful of Allah. I know He is always near, in all I say and do. When I remember Him, my heart grows calm and sure.
